name: media-carousel-01
title: Media Carousel 01
author: ilinxa
description: Embla-driven image+video carousel with two variants (gallery peek-scale / linear snap). Composes video-player-01 for video items via the isActive contract — first cross-folder import in the registry; videos in inactive slides pause cleanly. Single-item shortcut bypasses Embla. Built-in image + video handlers + renderItem slot. Imperative ref handle. Third ship in the social-posts-system arc.
